'''fakanga''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:loafer|loafer]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-k-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:loafer|loafer]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| fakanga
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:fækængæth|fækængæth]] || [[word:fækængæj|fækængæj]] || [[word:fækængæsh|fækængæsh]] || [[word:fækængæ|fækængæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:fakakangath|fakakangath]] || [[word:fakakangaj|fakakangaj]] || [[word:fakakangash|fakakangash]] || [[word:fakakanga|fakakanga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:fakangath|fakangath]] || [[word:fakangaj|fakangaj]] || [[word:fakangash|fakangash]] || [[word:fakanga|fakanga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:fakafngath|fakafngath]] || [[word:fakafngaj|fakafngaj]] || [[word:fakafngash|fakafngash]] || [[word:fakafngaf|fakafngaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:fakangatha|fakangatha]] || [[word:fakangaja|fakangaja]] || [[word:fakangasha|fakangasha]] || [[word:fakangaka|fakangaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:fakangath|fakangath]] || [[word:fakangaj|fakangaj]] || [[word:fakangash|fakangash]] || [[word:fakanga|fakanga]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:fakangathal|fakangathal]] || [[word:fakangajal|fakangajal]] || [[word:fakangashal|fakangashal]] || [[word:fakangakal|fakangakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:fakangathatha|fakangathatha]] || [[word:fakangajaja|fakangajaja]] || [[word:fakangashasha|fakangashasha]] || [[word:fakangaka|fakangaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:fakangathan|fakangathan]] || [[word:fakangajan|fakangajan]] || [[word:fakangashan|fakangashan]] || [[word:fakangakan|fakangakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:fakangathaoro|fakangathaoro]] || [[word:fakangajaoro|fakangajaoro]] || [[word:fakangashaoro|fakangashaoro]] || [[word:fakangakaoro|fakangakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7296ca6}}
